name: DLPIncident
description: DLPIncident schema from Palo Alto Networks Enterprise DLP API

data_pattern_name.description: Name of the data pattern that triggered the incident.

data_pattern_id.description: Identifier of the data pattern that triggered the incident.

match_count.description: Number of data pattern matches in the content.

channel.description: Channel where the data exposure was detected.

user.description: Email address or username of the user involved.

timestamp.description: Timestamp when the incident was detected.

file_name.description: Name of the file containing sensitive data.

file_size.description: Size of the file in bytes.

action_taken.description: Automated action taken on the incident.

reviewer_comments.description: Comments added by the reviewing analyst.

reviewed_by.description: Email address of the analyst who reviewed the incident.

reviewed_at.description: Timestamp when the incident was last reviewed.
